title: TSX-first Architecture
subtitle: Define structure, slots, and component families before generating each slide.

points.title: Blueprint catalog
points.description: Catalog describes available structures, content fit, and selection rules.

points.title: Slot contract

points.title: Generic renderers
points.description: Slides own stable rendering while data and blueprint instances drive the business theme.
